name: baseline_classic_rag
description: Classic RAG baseline: retrieve top-k chunks and answer directly with one model.

name: curated_pedagogical_granite
description: Retrieve top-k chunks, curate evidence with Agent 1, then synthesize a pedagogical response with Granite.

name: curated_pedagogical_granite_with_minimum_learning_path
description: Retrieve top-k chunks, curate evidence with Agent 1, construct a minimum learning path, then synthesize a pedagogical response with Granite.
